inventory.name: appserver-vultr
inventory.os: Linux appserver-vultr 5.15.0-133-generic #144-Ubuntu SMP Fri Feb 7 20:47:38 UTC 2025 x86_64

inventory.name: appserver-hive
inventory.os: Linux appserver-hive 5.15.0-116-generic #126-Ubuntu SMP Mon Jul 1 10:14:24 UTC 2024 x86_64

discovery_rule.name: PostgreSQL databases discovery
discovery_rule.description: PostgreSQL database discovery. Use regular expressions to configure search.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL: database {#DBNAME5} size
item_prototype.description: Single database size.

discovery_rule.name: PostgreSQL streaming stand-by discovery
discovery_rule.description: Low level discovery for streaming replication servers which connected to this server.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL packet loss with {#HOTSTANDBY2}, %

trigger_prototype.name: PostgreSQL packet loss between {HOSTNAME} and {#HOTSTANDBY5} too high ({ITEM.LASTVALUE})

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL streaming lag with {#HOTSTANDBY5} in bytes

trigger_prototype.name: PostgreSQL streaming lag between {HOSTNAME} and {#HOTSTANDBY5} too high ({ITEM.LASTVALUE})

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL streaming lag with {#HOTSTANDBY2} in seconds
item_prototype.description: ATTENTION: This check requires access to the remote server postgresql service, respectively, should be determined access in pg_hba.conf on remote server. Example: host zabbix postgres 1.2.3.4/32 trust

trigger_prototype.name: PostgreSQL streaming lag between {HOSTNAME} and {#HOTSTANDBY2} too high ({ITEM.LASTVALUE})

discovery_rule.name: PostgreSQL database tables discovery
discovery_rule.description: PostgreSQL tables discovery. Use regular expressions to configure search. Disabled by default because may add too many items.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL: table {#TABLENAME5} indexes size
item_prototype.description: PostgreSQL all indexes size which belongs to a single table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL: table {#TABLENAME5} size
item_prototype.description: PostgreSQL single table size.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: analyzes
item_prototype.description: Number of analyze operations performed on this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: autoanalyzes
item_prototype.description: Number of autoanalyze operations performed on this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: autovacuums
item_prototype.description: Number of autovacuum operations performed on this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: cache blocks hits per second
item_prototype.description: Number of buffer hits in this table

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: cache blocks read per second
item_prototype.description: Number of disk blocks read from this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: index blocks hit per second
item_prototype.description: Number of buffer hits in all indexes on this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: index blocks read per second
item_prototype.description: Number of disk blocks read from all indexes on this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: index scans
item_prototype.description: Number of index scans initiated on this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: tuples read per second by index scans
item_prototype.description: Number of live rows fetched by index scans.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: dead rows
item_prototype.description: Estimated number of dead rows.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: live rows
item_prototype.description: Estimated number of live rows.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: rows deleted per second
item_prototype.description: Number of rows deleted.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: rows HOT updated per second
item_prototype.description: Number of rows HOT updated (i.e., with no separate index update required).

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: rows inserted per second
item_prototype.description: Number of rows inserted.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: rows updated per second
item_prototype.description: Number of rows updated.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: sequential scans
item_prototype.description: Number of sequential scans initiated on this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: tuples read per second by sequential scans
item_prototype.description: Number of live rows fetched by sequential scans.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: disk blocks hits per second from TOAST indexes
item_prototype.description: Number of buffer hits in this table's TOAST table index (if any).

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: disk blocks read per second from TOAST indexes
item_prototype.description: Number of disk blocks read from this table's TOAST table index (if any).

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: disk blocks hits per second from TOAST
item_prototype.description: Number of buffer hits in this table's TOAST table (if any).

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: disk blocks read per second from TOAST
item_prototype.description: Number of disk blocks read from this table's TOAST table (if any).

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL table {#TABLENAME5} stat: vacuums
item_prototype.description: Number of vacuum operations performed on this table.

item_prototype.name: PostgreSQL: table {#TABLENAME5} rows count
item_prototype.description: PostgreSQL single table rows count.

trigger.name: Practice Check GraphQL not requesting Account ID

item.name: 10 day clientactions beta
10 day clientactions
audit_list
item.params: select case when date::date = (now()::timestamp at time zone 'utc' at time zone 'cst6cdt')::date then 'good' else date::varchar end from "LastRun" where id = 3;

trigger.name: Audit List has not Completed for Today

item.name: clearlog
item.params: select case when (date > now() - interval '2 hours') then 'good' else (date::timestamp at time zone 'utc' at time zone 'cst6cdt')::varchar end from "LastRun" where id = 2;

item.name: generatestats
item.params: select case when date >= now() - interval '30 hours' then 'good' else to_char(date, 'Day FMMM/FMDD FMHH:MI AM') end from "LastRun" where id = 1

item.name: HomeAgain mismatch
practicecheck aggregation failing
item.params: select case count(vsmartaccountid) when 0 then 'good' else count(vsmartaccountid)::text || ': ' || string_agg(coalesce(vsmartaccountid::text,'null') , ';') || ';' end as ca from "Account" where active = true and (lastaggregationtime < now() - interval '1 day' or lastaggregationtime isnull)

trigger.name: Practice Check Accounts Not Updated in 24 Hours

item.name: microchip
item.params: select case count(id) when 0 then 'good' else concat(count(id)::text,': ',string_agg(id::text, ',')) end as ca from "StateInstance" where lastpull < now() - interval '24 hours' and setup_date < now() - interval '24 hours' and active = true and pulltype != 2;

item.name: merckwcf max vsurvimportdate
use_api_id

trigger.name: Accounts with useAPI enabled and not clearing

item.name: VSmartBeta_Last_Emailed
item.params: select case when max(lastemaildate) < now() - interval '24 hours' then to_char(max(lastemaildate)::timestamp at time zone 'utc' at time zone 'CST6CDT', 'Day FMMM/FMDD FMHH:MI AM') else 'good' end as lastemail from "Account"

item.name: VSmartProd_Last_Emailed
item.params: select case when max(lastemaildate) < now() - interval '2 hours' then to_char(max(lastemaildate)::timestamp at time zone 'utc' at time zone 'CST6CDT', 'Day FMMM/FMDD FMHH:MI AM') else 'good' end as lastemail from "Account"

item.name: Writeback Schedule Missing
item.params: select case count(*) when 0 then 'good' else count(*)::text || ': ' || string_agg(aca.account_id::varchar, ';') || ';' end as ca from "AccountClientAction" aca left join "ClientActionSchedule" cas on cas.clientaction_id = aca.clientaction_id and cas.account_id = aca.account_id where aca.clientaction_id = 173 and cas.id isnull;

item.name: transaction_writeback
item.params: select case when count(*) = 0 then 'good' else count(distinct a.id)||': '||string_agg(distinct a.id||','||a.hospitalname,'; ') end from "Account" a, "TransactionWriteBack" t where a.id = t.account_id and successfullywritten is distinct from true and last_modified < now() - interval '3 days';

trigger.name: Accounts w/ No Successful TransactionWritebacks in the Last 3 Days

inventory.name: dbprimary
inventory.os: Linux dbprimary 5.15.0-131-generic #141-Ubuntu SMP Fri Jan 10 21:18:28 UTC 2025 x86_64

inventory.name: vsmart.vsurv.com
inventory.os: Linux vsmart.vsurv.com 5.8.0-050800-generic #202008022230 SMP Sun Aug 2 22:33:21 UTC 2020 x86_64

trigger.name: CPU Utilization greater then 30% for 5 min
Hotswap not Streaming from DB1 for > 5 min

graph.name: wal delay to streaming lag bytes
